p.c: function[T0: NormedField, T1: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: NormedSpace[T0, T1]) { norm_smul_constraint[T0, T1](x0.module.smul) }[K, V](ns)

goal: norm_smul_constraint[K, V](ns.module.smul) = forall(x0: K, x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }

p.c: function[T0: NormedField, T1: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T1) { x0(x1, x2).norm = x1.norm * x2.norm } = norm_smul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[K, V](ns.module.smul)
not norm_smul_constraint[K, V](ns.module.smul) or forall(x0: K, x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm } = true
(forall(x0: K) { not norm_smul_constraint[K, V](ns.module.smul) or forall(x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm } = true })
(forall(x0: K) { forall(x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm } = true })
not forall(x0: K, x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm } or norm_smul_constraint[K, V](ns.module.smul)
function(x0: K, x1: V) { ns.module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }(r, v)
function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0) { (-x0).norm = x0.norm }[K](r)
function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0) { (-x0).norm = x0.norm }[V](ns.module.smul(r, v))
function(x0: Real) { 1 * x0 = x0 }(v.norm)
function[T0: NormedField, T2: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T2, x2: NormedSpace[T0, T2]) { x0.norm * x1.norm = x2.module.smul(x0, x1).norm }[K, V](r, v, ns)
function[T0: NormedField, T1: NormedAddCommGroup] { forall(x0: T0, x1: T1, x2: NormedSpace[T0, T1]) { x0.norm * x1.norm = x2.module.smul(x0, x1).norm } }

goal: ns.module.smul(r, u + v) = ns.module.smul(r, u) + ns.module.smul(r, v)
ns.module.smul(r, u + v).norm = (ns.module.smul(r, u) + ns.module.smul(r, v)).norm
(ns.module.smul(r, u) + ns.module.smul(r, v)).norm <= ns.module.smul(r, u).norm + ns.module.smul(r, v).norm

p.c: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 + x1).norm <= x0.norm + x1.norm }[V](ns.module.smul(r, u), ns.module.smul(r, v))

goal: ns.module.smul(r, u).norm + ns.module.smul(r, v).norm = r.norm * u.norm + r.norm * v.norm
ns.module.smul(r, u) - ns.module.smul(r, v) = ns.module.smul(r, u) + -ns.module.smul(r, v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[V](ns.module.smul(r, u), ns.module.smul(r, v))

goal: ns.module.smul(r, u) + -ns.module.smul(r, v) = ns.module.smul(r, u) + ns.module.smul(r, -v)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[V](u, v)

goal: ns.module.smul(r, u) - ns.module.smul(r, v) = ns.module.smul(r, u - v)
(ns.module.smul(r, u) - ns.module.smul(r, v)).norm = ns.module.smul(r, u - v).norm
norm_distance(ns.module.smul(r, u), ns.module.smul(r, v)) = (ns.module.smul(r, u) - ns.module.smul(r, v)).norm

p.c: function[T0: NormedField, T1: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: NormedSpace[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T1) { x0.module.smul(x1, x2) = normed_space_smul_map[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[K, V](ns, r, v)

goal: normed_space_smul_set[K, V](ns, r, s) = set_image[V, V](s, normed_space_smul_map[K, V](ns, r))

p.c: function[T0: NormedField, T1: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: Set[T1], x1: NormedSpace[T0, T1], x2: T0) { set_image[T1, T1](x0, normed_space_smul_map[T0, T1](x1, x2)) = normed_space_smul_set[T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[K, V](s, ns, r)

function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup, T1: NormedField] { forall(x0: Set[T0], x1: NormedSpace[T1, T0], x2: T1) { set_image[T0, T0](x0, normed_space_smul_map[T1, T0](x1, x2)) = normed_space_smul_set[T1, T0](x1, x2, x0) } }

goal: set_image[V, V](s, normed_space_smul_map[K, V](ns, r)).contains(normed_space_smul_map(ns, r, v))

goal: norm_distance(ns.module.smul(r, w), ns.module.smul(r, x)) = r.norm * norm_distance(w, x)

p.c: function[T0: NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: Real) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) < x2 = x0 ∈ norm_open_ball[T0](x1, x2) }[V](y, ns.module.smul(r, x), r.norm * eps)
